Communication with my main sales specialist sucked over e-mail, but everyone I spoke with at my local Tesla office answered all my questions perfectly. Update 7/1 - Well, one day after I accepted the vehicle, my rear reflex right hand side developed a stress crack, most likely due to the heat wave we experienced.  Fixed 4 days after reporting.  Also have to bring the car in for a sound system repair (front passenger speaker has a short or loose wiring causing it to have static when going over bumps at times).  Will let people know how that repair went.
